ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show confirmation dialogs before performing bulk operations.
ast.target: 在执行批量操作前显示确认对话框。

ast.source: Display the select all button in the toolbar.
ast.target: 在工具栏中显示全选按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the clear selection button in the toolbar.
ast.target: 在工具栏中显示清除选择按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the publish button in the toolbar.
ast.target: 在工具栏中显示发布按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the draft button in the toolbar.
ast.target: 在工具栏中显示草稿按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the tags button in the toolbar.
ast.target: 在工具栏中显示标签按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the set property button in the toolbar.
ast.target: 在工具栏中显示设置属性按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the remove property button in the toolbar.
ast.target: 在工具栏中显示移除属性按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the delete button in the toolbar.
ast.target: 在工具栏中显示删除按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, deleting a note will delete its parent folder and all its contents if the note file name matches the specified name.
ast.target: 启用后，如果笔记文件名与指定名称匹配，删除笔记时将同时删除其父文件夹及其所有内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: File name that triggers parent folder deletion.
ast.target: 触发父文件夹删除的文件名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When deleting a note, automatically delete attachments that are only used by that note. Attachments used by other notes will be preserved.
ast.target: 删除笔记时，自动删除仅被该笔记使用的附件。被其他笔记使用的附件将被保留。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show confirmation dialog before deleting files.
ast.target: 删除文件前显示确认对话框。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use the home icon instead of blocks icon for the plugin view in the view selector. Restart Obsidian for this change to take effect.
ast.target: 在视图选择器中，使用主页图标代替方块图标作为插件视图。重启 Obsidian 以使此更改生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, animated gifs will display only the first frame when used as card covers or thumbnails.
ast.target: 启用后，当用作卡片封面或缩略图时，动态 GIF 将仅显示第一帧。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delay in milliseconds before refreshing embedded views when switching files. Higher values reduce CPU usage but may make views feel less responsive. Range: 50-500ms.
ast.target: 切换文件时刷新嵌入视图前的延迟（毫秒）。较高的值可降低 CPU 使用率，但可能使视图响应变慢。范围：50-500ms。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of cards above which virtual scrolling is enabled. Virtual scrolling only renders cards in the viewport, improving performance for large collections. Set to 0 to always enable, or a high value to disable.
ast.target: 启用虚拟滚动的卡片数量阈值。虚拟滚动仅渲染视口中的卡片，可提高大型集合的性能。设置为 0 表示始终启用，设置为高值则禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of cards to render above and below the visible viewport when virtual scrolling is active. Higher values reduce visual glitches when scrolling fast but use more memory.
ast.target: 虚拟滚动激活时，在可见视口上方和下方渲染的卡片数量。较高的值可减少快速滚动时的视觉故障，但会占用更多内存。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show an icon on card titles that launches a command when clicked.
ast.target: 在卡片标题上显示一个图标，点击时启动命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The command to execute when clicking the quick edit icon on a card title.
ast.target: 点击卡片标题上的快速编辑图标时执行的命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the icon to display for the quick edit button on card titles.
ast.target: 选择要在卡片标题的快速编辑按钮上显示的图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For commands that don't have special handling, attempt to open the file and execute the command. Some commands may not work properly this way.
ast.target: 对于没有特殊处理的命令，尝试打开文件并执行命令。某些命令可能无法通过此方式正常工作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 输入要添加的标签（用逗号分隔）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the property name to set.
ast.target: 输入要设置的属性名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the property value. For list type, use comma- or newline-separated values.
ast.target: 输入属性值。对于列表类型，请使用逗号或换行符分隔的值。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Delete parent folder for specific file name
ast.target: 删除特定文件名的父文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use home icon for the plugin view
ast.target: 为插件视图使用主页图标

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Force static image for animated gifs
ast.target: 强制将动画GIF显示为静态图像

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 嵌入式视图刷新防抖（毫秒）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Attempt to open file and execute quick edit command
ast.target: 尝试打开文件并执行快速编辑命令

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 标签1, 标签2, 标签3

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Error loading view. Check console for details.
ast.target: 加载视图出错。请检查控制台获取详细信息。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Bases CMS] Error getting commands via listCommands():
ast.target: [Bases CMS] 通过 listCommands() 获取命令时出错：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Bases CMS] Error getting commands via registry:
ast.target: [Bases CMS] 通过注册表获取命令时出错：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Bases CMS] Error getting commands via internal registry:
ast.target: [Bases CMS] 通过内部注册表获取命令时出错：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Bases CMS] Error getting icon IDs from Obsidian:
ast.target: [Bases CMS] 从 Obsidian 获取图标 ID 时出错：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to convert GIF to static image:
ast.target: 将 GIF 转换为静态图像失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Bases CMS] Toolbar element not found, recreating...
ast.target: [Bases CMS] 未找到工具栏元素，正在重新创建...

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Bases CMS] Toolbar not in DOM, repositioning...
ast.target: [Bases CMS] 工具栏不在 DOM 中，正在重新定位...

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Bases CMS: Error refreshing newly created embedded view:
ast.target: Bases CMS：刷新新创建的嵌入式视图时出错：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Bases CMS: registerBasesView not available. Is Bases plugin installed?
ast.target: Bases CMS：registerBasesView 不可用。Bases 插件是否已安装？

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Bases CMS: Error refreshing embedded view:
ast.target: Bases CMS：刷新嵌入式视图时出错：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This command doesn't have special handling. Enable attempt to open file and execute quick edit command in settings to try executing it.
ast.target: 此命令没有特殊处理。请在设置中启用“尝试打开文件并执行快速编辑命令”以尝试执行它。

ast.target: 在视图选择器中为主页图标而非块图标用于插件视图。重启 Obsidian 以使此更改生效。

ast.source: Number of cards above which virtual scrolling is enabled. Virtual scrolling only renders cards in the viewport, improving performance for large collections. Set to 0 to always enable, or a high value to disable.
ast.target: 启用虚拟滚动的卡片数量阈值。虚拟滚动仅渲染视口中的卡片，可提高大型集合的性能。设置为 0 表示始终启用，或设置为较高值以禁用。

ast.source: Number of cards to render above and below the visible viewport when virtual scrolling is active. Higher values reduce visual glitches when scrolling fast but use more memory.
ast.target: 虚拟滚动激活时，在可见视口上方和下方渲染的卡片数量。较高的值可减少快速滚动时的视觉故障，但会占用更多内存。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, displays both date and time using your system locale settings
ast.target: 启用后，将使用您的系统区域设置同时显示日期和时间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Skip the Bases modal and create notes directly (like the file explorer). When disabled, uses normal Bases behavior with the property popup.
ast.target: 跳过 Bases 模态框并直接创建笔记（类似文件资源管理器）。禁用时，使用正常的 Bases 行为并显示属性弹出窗口。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Folder path where new notes will be created. Use / for vault root, or specify a folder path. Works independently of "Open new notes directly".
ast.target: 创建新笔记的文件夹路径。使用 / 表示保险库根目录，或指定文件夹路径。与“直接打开新笔记”功能独立工作。
